task_completion.description: The three specified images are imported onto Slide 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three distinct images (representing team brainstorm, office lunch, and design review) present on the second slide of the presentation.

task_completion.description: Each image is framed with a white rectangle to create a 'Polaroid-style' look.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a white rectangular shape placed behind or around each of the three images, with a thicker bottom margin typical of a Polaroid photo.

task_completion.description: Each image is grouped with its respective white frame.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for selection bounding boxes that encompass both the image and the white frame as a single unit, or observe that they have been rotated and moved perfectly together without misalignment.

task_completion.description: The photo groups are rotated slightly (between -15 and +15 degrees).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Polaroid-style groups being tilted at slight, non-zero angles rather than being perfectly horizontal or vertical.

task_completion.description: The photo groups are arranged in an overlapping, scattered pile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the three rotated Polaroid groups overlapping one another in a clustered, scattered arrangement on Slide 2.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the LibreOffice Impress interface open with the presentation being actively edited, rather than terminal windows running scripts to modify the .odp file.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual provided image files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual imported images (which have colored backgrounds and text labels) rather than the agent manually drawing shapes to simulate the images.

integrity.description: The composition was created on Slide 2.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the slide pane on the left to confirm that Slide 2 is the active slide where the photo stack is being arranged, while Slide 1 ('Agency Culture') remains the title slide.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation is located at '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/culture_deck.odp'. Slide 1 is a title slide ('Agency Culture') and Slide 2 is initially blank. The agent must use three 400x300 JPEG images ('team_brainstorm.jpg', 'office_lunch.jpg', 'design_review.jpg') from '/home/ga/Documents/Assets'. The final composition on Slide 2 must contain exactly 3 groups, each consisting of one image and a white rectangle frame. The groups must have a non-zero rotation between -15 and +15 degrees and be arranged in an overlapping pile.
